businessName: Dakar Auto Detail - Omaha Mobile Car Wash
description: If you have met Simon aka Junior, you’ll know that we had great luck filling our first position. But we have yet to fill our second. We had over 50 applicants but are very choosy who we send out to your cars. If you have anyone in mind for the position please pass on the details! Auto Detailer
